title: Question: Does Verilator support assertion delay aperator?
body:
Hey,
I am relatively new to Verilator. I tried to write an assert like this:
`assert property (@(posedge clk_i) signal_a -> ##2 signal_b ) else begin
 $display("x");
end`
But this leads to a syntax error.
`syntax error, unexpected ##, expecting TYPE-IDENTIFIER`
Does Verilator support the delay operator ## ?
